text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After completing our daily training,
<chrname> and I part ways and head
home.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Aoi Kiryuin, a fellow trainer here at Tracen
Academy and an earnest woman.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Great work out there. We've just finished up too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another Tracen Academy trainer, the strict but
accomplished Riko Kashimoto, approaches us
looking a little exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Good evening.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, Trainer Kashimoto! You should still be
resting!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: There's no need for concern. I'm really... sigh... not that tired...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer Kashimoto! Have you finished your
training for the day?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. Yes, I just thought I'd check the track
one last time before tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking of doing the same! Um, if it's all
right with you...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Shall we do it together?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: A-as long as it's okay with you!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind. We'll be able to conduct a basic
check more efficiently by working together.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Then let's get started right away!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hm, the turf is a little rough here...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the academy staff will tend to it
tomorrow morning, but we should be careful if we
decide to do an early session.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Definitely! Um, next up is... Over there!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: The dirt here is... huff... fine. There shouldn't be any issues... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right, Trainer Kashimoto? A-are we
going too fast?!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! We should have been taking it slow...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: No... I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If anything, we could stand to go a bit faster.
Let's hurry, Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure about this?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... The... the turf over here is still adequate!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kashimoto! Please don't push yourself so
hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: So you were running flat out.

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: How pathetic... I've brought shame upon myself.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
D-don't be silly! But... Um, uh... Trainer
<username>!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Your training regimen today was spectacular! And
I'm not just talking about your lap times.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You and your partner were in perfect sync. I could
really tell how much you trust each other.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I have to agree on that point. You can't pull off
that kind of training without having strong faith in
one another.
choice_data_list: I'm honored to receive such praise!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That said, I don't believe you have us beat on
that front. I, too, have traveled this long journey
alongside my partners.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If we entered the same race, I wholeheartedly
believe they would emerge victorious.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I did lavish praise on you just now, but I
refuse to believe that my Meek would lose!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Meek is the one out there running—she's the one
giving it her all. Once those starting gates open,
all I can do is watch!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have more faith in her than I do
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What about you, Trainer
<username>? Do you believe
in your partner?
choice_data_list: I do. And I have no intention of losing.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I guess that was a pointless question.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin, Trainer
<username>, I wish you both
the best of luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, as we wish each other luck, I renew my
faith in <chrname> and resolve to do
my best!
